attestations.statement: Cross-model semantic adequacy review, rs-mca commit 3404d21b, performed 2026-07-18 (full text: slackmca_pilot/ADEQUACY_REVIEW.md, committed ee5909e). Reviewer lineage claude, independent of the subject's authors (aristotle/Harmonic draft, codex packaging). METHOD: statement-level comparison of tex/slackMCA_v4.tex against the Lean source, definitional roots first. ROOTS VERIFIED: codeList = paper's decoding list at agreement s (deg<k, >=s agreements with the interpolant); Uc = monic monomial-prefix word; esymPrefix = locator coefficients = (-1)^j e_j (the paper's Phi_sigma); MCAbadWitness = standard MCA-bad-with-witness. PER-LABEL: thm:pigeonhole MATCH (division-free C(n,s) <= q^sigma * list); lem:antipodal EXACT; thm:qcore MATCH (same hypotheses M|k, k/M<=n/M-1, 1<=sigma<M); thm:upstairs MATCH at the paper's M0 (inverse_quotient parametrized over 2^(a-1)<=sigma; largest such a yields exactly mu_M0-coset invariance; no cardinality hypothesis needed -- stronger); cor:upstairs-poly MATCH (2^(2^(m-a)) = 2^(n/M0)); cor:entropy-lower MATCH in the clean finitary form C(n,s)^eps <= list; thm:rigidcyclo MATCH over C (equivalent to Z[zeta_N] via the injective embedding); thm:rigidfermat EXACT incl. the signed-binary integer core; thm:onez MATCH for the core uniqueness, arbitrary S; prop:monomial-fiber MATCH (fiber injection). RESIDUALS (none load-bearing for the two mapped claims): thm:upstairs converse not in inverse_quotient; the entropy form 2^(eps n H - o(n)) is the unformalized Stirling rewriting of the formalized bound (package documents this); density sharpening of cor:upstairs-poly not formalized; thm:rigidcyclo's V2/ladder tail and thm:onez's counting consequences not formalized. Divergences are GENERALIZATIONS (arbitrary evaluation sets, arbitrary witness sets) or equivalent settings; no statement found semantically thinned. VERDICT: the Lean statements adequately express the claimed paper labels as scoped by claim map claimmap_d58819dd2f37.
